forecast_effectiveness_summary.effectiveness_definition: Advisory forecast effectiveness: forecast_accuracy is the share of key forecasts whose lifecycle_stage aligns with the forecast_classification alignment map; predicted_recurrences counts watch/elevated/concentrated forecasts; realized_recurrences counts aligned lifecycle outcomes. Low observation volume yields low effectiveness_confidence without fabricating accuracy.

governance_effectiveness_summary.conversion_definition: Advisory conversion rates from current governance funnel snapshot: watchlist_conversion_rate is investigate_keys / max(watch_keys, 1); investigate_conversion_rate is prioritize_keys / max(investigate_keys, 1); prioritize_conversion_rate is remediation_ready_keys / max(prioritize_keys, 1), where remediation_ready_keys have reduction_potential >= investigate threshold; retirement_conversion_rate is retirement_outcome_keys / max(total_governed_keys, 1).

outcome_validation_summary.definition: Advisory protected replay outcome validation accepts only evidenced lifecycle closures (retired/dormant keys with event-log or inactivity backing), measurable trajectory recurrence reduction, or confirmed remediation impact on targeted keys. Synthetic keys, manually forced statuses, and inferred success without evidence are rejected.
outcome_validation_summary.outcome_evidence_strength_definition: Outcome-grounded 0-1 effectiveness evidence: 20% trajectory factor + 40% validated outcome coverage (validated_outcomes / total_keys) + 40% max(validated_closure_rate, validated_recurrence_reduction_rate, validated_remediation_impact_rate).

portfolio_trajectory_summary.trajectory_definition: Portfolio trajectory compares current portfolio, governance, lifecycle, and stability metrics against a stored baseline snapshot when available; otherwise reports baseline values with trajectory_available=false and zero change metrics.

protected_replay_regression_recurrence_r.definition: Share of observed recurrence keys with occurrence_count >= 2 in the measured history window.
protected_replay_regression_recurrence_r.interpretation: Initial measurable proxy for recurrence keys that became active after prior observation; refine when richer state transitions exist. Advisory and report-only; does not gate protected replay.

recurrence_completion.completion_distance_definition: Estimated completion distance is 100 - overall_completion_score; lower values indicate closer proximity to program graduation.
recurrence_completion.completion_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 overall completion score: weighted average of dimension completion scores using recurrence maturity dimension weights. Each dimension completion_score is 100 * met_requirements / total_requirements.
recurrence_completion.graduation_definition: Program graduated when all six capability dimensions report completion_met=true, overall_maturity_score >= 80, operational_readiness_score >= 80, forecast_confidence >= 0.75, and effectiveness_confidence >= 0.75.

recurrence_completion_summary.completion_distance_definition: Estimated completion distance is 100 - overall_completion_score; lower values indicate closer proximity to program graduation.
recurrence_completion_summary.completion_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 overall completion score: weighted average of dimension completion scores using recurrence maturity dimension weights. Each dimension completion_score is 100 * met_requirements / total_requirements.
recurrence_completion_summary.graduation_definition: Program graduated when all six capability dimensions report completion_met=true, overall_maturity_score >= 80, operational_readiness_score >= 80, forecast_confidence >= 0.75, and effectiveness_confidence >= 0.75.

roadmap_reference.roadmap_priority_guidance: Execute roadmap sequence in dependency order to reach optimized maturity.

target_state_reference.completion_criteria_definition: Optimized recurrence target state requires all maturity dimensions >= 80, operational_readiness >= 80, forecast_confidence >= 0.75, effectiveness_confidence >= 0.75, trajectory_available=true, measurable closure effectiveness, and measurable remediation effectiveness. Completion criteria are explicit boolean checks against these thresholds.

recurrence_completion_summary.completion_distance_definition: Estimated completion distance is 100 - overall_completion_score; lower values indicate closer proximity to program graduation.
recurrence_completion_summary.completion_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 overall completion score: weighted average of dimension completion scores using recurrence maturity dimension weights. Each dimension completion_score is 100 * met_requirements / total_requirements.
recurrence_completion_summary.graduation_definition: Program graduated when all six capability dimensions report completion_met=true, overall_maturity_score >= 80, operational_readiness_score >= 80, forecast_confidence >= 0.75, and effectiveness_confidence >= 0.75.

blind_spot_reassessment.rationale: Protected replay observation and key volume now meet maturity confidence thresholds.
Forecast confidence aligns with evidence strength.

blockers_remaining: Monitor owner_drift_bucket transitions separately from recurrence lifecycle.
blind_spot_reassessment.rationale: Recurrence ownership drift is still not tracked as a dedicated longitudinal signal.

blockers_remaining: Consider temporal decay modeling if history spans long idle periods.
blind_spot_reassessment.rationale: Confidence scores still do not decay with stale observations or aging keys.

blockers_remaining: Retain versioned history artifacts for audit replay if formal compliance is required.
blind_spot_reassessment.rationale: Trajectory history artifacts provide versioned snapshots, but no immutable audit chain exists.

blockers_remaining: Do not treat effectiveness confidence as graduation-ready without outcome validation.
blind_spot_reassessment.rationale: Effectiveness confidence substantially exceeds remediation, closure, and trajectory evidence.

recurrence_confidence_audit.calibration_definition: Advisory confidence calibration compares reported confidence metrics against evidence strength derived from protected replay observation volume, key coverage, trajectory availability, forecast accuracy, governance posture, and lifecycle/remediation outcomes. calibration_gap = reported_confidence - evidence_strength. Positive gaps indicate overconfidence; negative gaps indicate underconfidence; gaps within tolerance indicate calibration.

effectiveness_confidence_audit.evidence_definition: Outcome-grounded 0-1 effectiveness evidence: 20% trajectory factor + 40% validated outcome coverage (validated_outcomes / total_keys) + 40% max(validated_closure_rate, validated_recurrence_reduction_rate, validated_remediation_impact_rate).

forecast_confidence_audit.evidence_definition: Weighted blend: 30% observation volume factor min(1, observations/5), 20% key coverage factor min(1, keys/3), 25% trajectory factor (1.0 when trajectory_available else 0.4), 25% accuracy evidence forecast_accuracy * observation volume factor.

governance_confidence_audit.evidence_definition: Weighted blend: 30% observation volume factor, 25% watchlist coverage watchlist_size/max(keys,1), 20% owner dispersion 1 - owner_concentration_ratio, 25% governance_health_score/100.

graduation_threshold_validation.rationale: Forecast confidence and evidence strength both meet graduation threshold.
Effectiveness confidence meets threshold but substantially exceeds remediation, closure, and trajectory evidence.
Operational readiness meets target while overall maturity remains below program target.
Longitudinal trajectory comparison is active across two or more snapshots.
Governance confidence meets threshold but exceeds governance health and funnel evidence.

outcome_validation_summary.definition: Advisory protected replay outcome validation accepts only evidenced lifecycle closures (retired/dormant keys with event-log or inactivity backing), measurable trajectory recurrence reduction, or confirmed remediation impact on targeted keys. Synthetic keys, manually forced statuses, and inferred success without evidence are rejected.
outcome_validation_summary.outcome_evidence_strength_definition: Outcome-grounded 0-1 effectiveness evidence: 20% trajectory factor + 40% validated outcome coverage (validated_outcomes / total_keys) + 40% max(validated_closure_rate, validated_recurrence_reduction_rate, validated_remediation_impact_rate).

recommended_actions: Do not treat effectiveness confidence as graduation-ready until remediation and closure evidence exists.
Monitor owner_drift_bucket transitions separately from recurrence lifecycle.
Consider temporal decay modeling if history spans long idle periods.
Do not treat effectiveness confidence as graduation-ready without outcome validation.

recurrence_confidence_calibration_summar.score_definition: Advisory 0-100 calibration score: 100 * (1 - average(abs(calibration_gap))) minus 5 points per component with overconfident status and gap > 0.20. Interpretation: 90-100 well calibrated; 70-89 acceptable; 50-69 needs monitoring; <50 significant calibration risk.

Advisory 0-100 calibration score: 100 * (1 - average(abs(calibration_gap))) minus 5 points per component with overconfident status and gap > 0.20. Interpretation: 90-100 well calibrated; 70-89 acceptable; 50-69 needs monitoring; <50 significant calibration risk.

effectiveness_confidence_audit.evidence_definition: Outcome-grounded 0-1 effectiveness evidence: 20% trajectory factor + 40% validated outcome coverage (validated_outcomes / total_keys) + 40% max(validated_closure_rate, validated_recurrence_reduction_rate, validated_remediation_impact_rate).

forecast_confidence_audit.evidence_definition: Weighted blend: 30% observation volume factor min(1, observations/5), 20% key coverage factor min(1, keys/3), 25% trajectory factor (1.0 when trajectory_available else 0.4), 25% accuracy evidence forecast_accuracy * observation volume factor.

governance_confidence_audit.evidence_definition: Weighted blend: 30% observation volume factor, 25% watchlist coverage watchlist_size/max(keys,1), 20% owner dispersion 1 - owner_concentration_ratio, 25% governance_health_score/100.

recurrence_confidence_calibration_summar.score_definition: Advisory 0-100 calibration score: 100 * (1 - average(abs(calibration_gap))) minus 5 points per component with overconfident status and gap > 0.20. Interpretation: 90-100 well calibrated; 70-89 acceptable; 50-69 needs monitoring; <50 significant calibration risk.

recurrence_final_graduation_decision.decision_definition: Advisory final graduation decision compares post-activation calibration, readiness, and blind-spot posture against BQ-C3 baseline. Formal graduation requires calibration score >= 70, largest gap <= 0.20, trajectory_available=true, and no critical blind spots.
recurrence_final_graduation_decision.final_recommendation_rationale: Trajectory is active and readiness improved, but confidence or outcome evidence still requires one narrowly scoped validation cycle.

trajectory_activation.message: Trajectory change detection active across baseline and current snapshots.

definitions.concentrated: Recurrence risk concentrated in this key within a multi-key population: observation share meets or exceeds 50% with multiple total observations across at least two keys.
definitions.elevated: Repeated protected observations with upward trajectory (recurring or persistent trend).
definitions.stable: Low estimated future recurrence risk; typically dormant trend or no upward trajectory.
definitions.watch: Emerging protected recurrence requiring observation before transition to recurring.

recurrence_forecast.forecast_risk_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 blend: 50% regression_recurrence_rate + 20% emerging_key_share + 20% elevated_key_share + 10% concentration_ratio (HHI of observation shares).

regression_recurrence_rate.definition: Share of observed recurrence keys with occurrence_count >= 2 in the measured history window.
regression_recurrence_rate.interpretation: Initial measurable proxy for recurrence keys that became active after prior observation; refine when richer state transitions exist. Advisory and report-only; does not gate protected replay.

recurrence_forecast.stability_score_definition: 100 * (1 - regression_recurrence_rate.rate). 100 means no protected recurrence keys have repeated observations; 0 means every observed key is recurrence-active.

recurrence_governance.governance_status_classification_definit: Deterministic priority order: retire_candidate when trend is dormant or status is retired; prioritize when roi_score >= prioritize_threshold (25), roi_confidence >= 0.15, and reduction_potential >= investigate_threshold (50); investigate when forecast is elevated/concentrated, trend is recurring/persistent, reduction_potential >= investigate_threshold (50) with non-emerging trend, or recurrence_rate >= 0.5 with at least two observations; watch when trend is emerging or forecast is watch; otherwise observe.

governance_summary.governance_confidence_definition: Weighted blend of roi_confidence (40%), forecast_confidence (35%), and observation volume factor min(1, total_observations / 5) (25%).
governance_summary.governance_health_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: 30% stability_score/100 + 25% (1 - portfolio_risk_score/100) + 20% (1 - watchlist_size/max(total_keys, 1)) + 15% (1 - prioritized_targets/max(total_keys, 1)) + 10% (1 - regression_recurrence_rate). Higher scores indicate healthier governance posture.

governance_status_definitions.investigate: Elevated or concentrated recurrence risk warrants root-cause review.
governance_status_definitions.observe: Limited evidence; continue passive monitoring without escalation.
governance_status_definitions.prioritize: Strong ROI and actionable leverage; prioritize remediation work.
governance_status_definitions.retire_candidate: Dormant recurrence with no recent activity; candidate to retire tracking.
governance_status_definitions.watch: Emerging recurrence or watch forecast; gather more protected history.

recurrence_governance_summary.governance_confidence_definition: Weighted blend of roi_confidence (40%), forecast_confidence (35%), and observation volume factor min(1, total_observations / 5) (25%).
recurrence_governance_summary.governance_health_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: 30% stability_score/100 + 25% (1 - portfolio_risk_score/100) + 20% (1 - watchlist_size/max(total_keys, 1)) + 15% (1 - prioritized_targets/max(total_keys, 1)) + 10% (1 - regression_recurrence_rate). Higher scores indicate healthier governance posture.

governance_status_definitions.investigate: Elevated or concentrated recurrence risk warrants root-cause review.
governance_status_definitions.observe: Limited evidence; continue passive monitoring without escalation.
governance_status_definitions.prioritize: Strong ROI and actionable leverage; prioritize remediation work.
governance_status_definitions.retire_candidate: Dormant recurrence with no recent activity; candidate to retire tracking.
governance_status_definitions.watch: Emerging recurrence or watch forecast; gather more protected history.

blind_spots.description: Confidence scores do not decay with stale observations or aging keys.
blind_spots.recommendation: Consider temporal decay modeling in a future cycle if history spans long idle periods.

blind_spots.description: No immutable audit chain links recurrence analytics revisions over time.
blind_spots.recommendation: Retain versioned history artifacts for audit replay if formal compliance is required.

blind_spots.description: Recurrence ownership drift across runs is not tracked as a dedicated longitudinal signal.
blind_spots.recommendation: Monitor owner_drift_bucket transitions separately from recurrence key lifecycle.

remaining_concerns: Governance health remains below completion target.
Program graduation criteria not yet met.

completion_reference.completion_distance_definition: Estimated completion distance is 100 - overall_completion_score; lower values indicate closer proximity to program graduation.
completion_reference.completion_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 overall completion score: weighted average of dimension completion scores using recurrence maturity dimension weights. Each dimension completion_score is 100 * met_requirements / total_requirements.
completion_reference.graduation_definition: Program graduated when all six capability dimensions report completion_met=true, overall_maturity_score >= 80, operational_readiness_score >= 80, forecast_confidence >= 0.75, and effectiveness_confidence >= 0.75.

effectiveness_validation.rationale: Forecast effectiveness metrics available with non-trivial confidence.
Zero conversion rates indicate governance funnel not yet exercised by history volume.
No resolved remediation outcomes observed in protected replay history.
Lifecycle closure rate requires retired or dormant keys to validate effectiveness.

graduation_readiness.readiness_definition: Advisory 0-100 graduation readiness score: 45% overall_completion_score + 30% operational_capability_ratio*100 + 15% validated_capability_ratio*100 + 10% average_capability_confidence*100 - 8 per critical blind spot - 3 per critical redundancy. Interpretation: 90-100 ready; 70-89 minor gaps; 50-69 moderate gaps; <50 major gaps.

recurrence_graduation_audit.readiness_definition: Advisory 0-100 graduation readiness score: 45% overall_completion_score + 30% operational_capability_ratio*100 + 15% validated_capability_ratio*100 + 10% average_capability_confidence*100 - 8 per critical blind spot - 3 per critical redundancy. Interpretation: 90-100 ready; 70-89 minor gaps; 50-69 moderate gaps; <50 major gaps.
recurrence_graduation_audit.recommended_next_action: Execute roadmap sequence in dependency order to reach optimized maturity.

recurrence_graduation_audit_summary.readiness_definition: Advisory 0-100 graduation readiness score: 45% overall_completion_score + 30% operational_capability_ratio*100 + 15% validated_capability_ratio*100 + 10% average_capability_confidence*100 - 8 per critical blind spot - 3 per critical redundancy. Interpretation: 90-100 ready; 70-89 minor gaps; 50-69 moderate gaps; <50 major gaps.
recurrence_graduation_audit_summary.recommended_next_action: Execute roadmap sequence in dependency order to reach optimized maturity.

redundancies.consolidation_recommendation: Use maturity scores for capability posture and completion scores for graduation gates; avoid treating both as independent KPIs in operator dashboards.
Program effectiveness measures outcomes; maturity measures capability. Report both but do not average them into a single headline metric.
Health score reflects posture; effectiveness reflects funnel conversion. Keep both, but label clearly to prevent duplicate escalation triggers.
Portfolio risk already blends forecast risk; prefer portfolio_risk_score for prioritization summaries unless forecast-specific drill-down is required.
Expose a single operator-facing readiness confidence only when all component confidences exceed graduation thresholds.

roadmap_validation.rationale: Volume threshold partially met; continued expansion still improves confidence.
Trajectory exists but downstream forecasting and readiness remain incomplete.
Forecast confidence met structurally but effectiveness evidence remains thin.
Closure signal exists but longitudinal closure effectiveness remains limited.
Reduction signal present but sample size may be insufficient.
Operational readiness improved but graduation thresholds not fully met.

recurrence_graduation_audit_summary.readiness_definition: Advisory 0-100 graduation readiness score: 45% overall_completion_score + 30% operational_capability_ratio*100 + 15% validated_capability_ratio*100 + 10% average_capability_confidence*100 - 8 per critical blind spot - 3 per critical redundancy. Interpretation: 90-100 ready; 70-89 minor gaps; 50-69 moderate gaps; <50 major gaps.
recurrence_graduation_audit_summary.recommended_next_action: Execute roadmap sequence in dependency order to reach optimized maturity.

recurrence_lifecycle.lifecycle_stage_classification_definitio: Deterministic lifecycle stage from trend classification and recurrence status: retired when status is retired/deprecated or dormant inactivity exceeds retirement threshold; otherwise lifecycle stage mirrors trend classification (emerging, recurring, persistent, dormant).

lifecycle_stage_definitions.dormant: Historical protected recurrence without observation within the last 30 days.
lifecycle_stage_definitions.emerging: First observed protected recurrence for the key.
lifecycle_stage_definitions.persistent: Repeated protected observations spanning at least 7 days between first and last seen.
lifecycle_stage_definitions.recurring: Repeated protected observations without an extended active span.
lifecycle_stage_definitions.retired: Explicitly retired recurrence status, or dormant beyond 90.0 days of inactivity.

lifecycle_summary.lifecycle_health_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: 25% retired_ratio + 15% dormant_ratio + 20% (1 - persistent_ratio) + 20% (1 - min(1, advancement_rate * 2)) + 20% emerging_ratio. Higher scores indicate healthier lifecycle posture with more closures and fewer advancing persistent recurrences.

recurrence_lifecycle.lifecycle_velocity_definition: observations_per_day is occurrence_count / max(recurrence_age_days, active_duration_days, 1); lifecycle_velocity equals observations_per_day; advancement_rate is advancing_transitions / max(total_keys, 1).

recurrence_lifecycle_summary.lifecycle_health_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: 25% retired_ratio + 15% dormant_ratio + 20% (1 - persistent_ratio) + 20% (1 - min(1, advancement_rate * 2)) + 20% emerging_ratio. Higher scores indicate healthier lifecycle posture with more closures and fewer advancing persistent recurrences.

forecasting_maturity.rationale: Forecasting maturity from model availability (7 key forecasts), forecast_confidence 1.00, confidence-weighted accuracy 0.71, scaled by volume factor 1.00.

governance_maturity.rationale: Governance maturity from watchlist/ownership/retirement structures (5/5 present), governance_health_score 45.9, and governance_confidence 1.00.

lifecycle_maturity.rationale: Lifecycle maturity from lifecycle tracking (7 keys), transition_summary present, age_distribution present, and lifecycle_health_score 35.7.

recurrence_maturity.maturity_gap_priority_definition: Improvement priority from current_score and gap to target (80): critical when current_score < 20 or gap >= 40; high when current_score < 40 or gap >= 25; medium when gap >= 15; otherwise low.
recurrence_maturity.maturity_level_definition: Maturity levels map 0-100 scores to capability stages: 0-19 Initial, 20-39 Developing, 40-59 Managed, 60-79 Measured, 80-100 Optimized.

forecasting_maturity.rationale: Forecasting maturity from model availability (7 key forecasts), forecast_confidence 1.00, confidence-weighted accuracy 0.71, scaled by volume factor 1.00.

governance_maturity.rationale: Governance maturity from watchlist/ownership/retirement structures (5/5 present), governance_health_score 45.9, and governance_confidence 1.00.

lifecycle_maturity.rationale: Lifecycle maturity from lifecycle tracking (7 keys), transition_summary present, age_distribution present, and lifecycle_health_score 35.7.

observability_maturity.rationale: Observability reflects analytics coverage (6/6 signals present: recurrence_history, trend_analytics, forecasting, portfolio_analytics, governance_signals, longitudinal_measurements). Volume quality factor 1.00 from 19 observations across 7 keys.

operational_readiness.rationale: Operational readiness from governance_confidence 1.00, effectiveness_confidence 1.00, forecast_confidence 1.00, trajectory_available true, and data sufficiency factor 1.00.

remediation_maturity.rationale: Remediation maturity from targeting/ROI structures (present), recurrence_reduction_rate 0.29, remediation_effectiveness 0.29, remediation_confidence 1.00.

observability_maturity.rationale: Observability reflects analytics coverage (6/6 signals present: recurrence_history, trend_analytics, forecasting, portfolio_analytics, governance_signals, longitudinal_measurements). Volume quality factor 1.00 from 19 observations across 7 keys.

operational_readiness.rationale: Operational readiness from governance_confidence 1.00, effectiveness_confidence 1.00, forecast_confidence 1.00, trajectory_available true, and data sufficiency factor 1.00.

recurrence_maturity.overall_maturity_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 weighted maturity score: 20% observability + 15% governance + 15% forecasting + 15% remediation + 15% lifecycle + 20% operational_readiness. Higher scores indicate a more mature recurrence capability independent of program outcome effectiveness.

recurrence_maturity_summary.maturity_level_definition: Maturity levels map 0-100 scores to capability stages: 0-19 Initial, 20-39 Developing, 40-59 Managed, 60-79 Measured, 80-100 Optimized.
recurrence_maturity_summary.overall_maturity_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 weighted maturity score: 20% observability + 15% governance + 15% forecasting + 15% remediation + 15% lifecycle + 20% operational_readiness. Higher scores indicate a more mature recurrence capability independent of program outcome effectiveness.

remediation_maturity.rationale: Remediation maturity from targeting/ROI structures (present), recurrence_reduction_rate 0.29, remediation_effectiveness 0.29, remediation_confidence 1.00.

recurrence_maturity_summary.overall_maturity_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 weighted maturity score: 20% observability + 15% governance + 15% forecasting + 15% remediation + 15% lifecycle + 20% operational_readiness. Higher scores indicate a more mature recurrence capability independent of program outcome effectiveness.

recurrence_outcome_validation.final_graduation_recommendation_rational: Some outcome evidence exists but calibration or effectiveness support remains insufficient for graduation.

Advisory 0-100 calibration score: 100 * (1 - average(abs(calibration_gap))) minus 5 points per component with overconfident status and gap > 0.20. Interpretation: 90-100 well calibrated; 70-89 acceptable; 50-69 needs monitoring; <50 significant calibration risk.

recurrence_outcome_validation.validation_definition: Advisory protected replay outcome validation accepts only evidenced lifecycle closures (retired/dormant keys with event-log or inactivity backing), measurable trajectory recurrence reduction, or confirmed remediation impact on targeted keys. Synthetic keys, manually forced statuses, and inferred success without evidence are rejected.

portfolio_summary.concentration_definition: Herfindahl index (sum of squared observation risk shares) per dimension. High concentration means risk is localized (easier remediation); low concentration means distributed risk (broader systemic concern).
portfolio_summary.portfolio_risk_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 blend: 60% forecast_risk_score/100 + 10% each dimension concentration ratio (owner, category, field_path, scenario). Higher scores indicate greater localized or forecast-weighted recurrence risk.

recurrence_portfolio_summary.concentration_definition: Herfindahl index (sum of squared observation risk shares) per dimension. High concentration means risk is localized (easier remediation); low concentration means distributed risk (broader systemic concern).
recurrence_portfolio_summary.portfolio_risk_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 blend: 60% forecast_risk_score/100 + 10% each dimension concentration ratio (owner, category, field_path, scenario). Higher scores indicate greater localized or forecast-weighted recurrence risk.

forecast_effectiveness_summary.effectiveness_definition: Advisory forecast effectiveness: forecast_accuracy is the share of key forecasts whose lifecycle_stage aligns with the forecast_classification alignment map; predicted_recurrences counts watch/elevated/concentrated forecasts; realized_recurrences counts aligned lifecycle outcomes. Low observation volume yields low effectiveness_confidence without fabricating accuracy.

governance_effectiveness_summary.conversion_definition: Advisory conversion rates from current governance funnel snapshot: watchlist_conversion_rate is investigate_keys / max(watch_keys, 1); investigate_conversion_rate is prioritize_keys / max(investigate_keys, 1); prioritize_conversion_rate is remediation_ready_keys / max(prioritize_keys, 1), where remediation_ready_keys have reduction_potential >= investigate threshold; retirement_conversion_rate is retirement_outcome_keys / max(total_governed_keys, 1).

portfolio_trajectory_summary.trajectory_definition: Portfolio trajectory compares current portfolio, governance, lifecycle, and stability metrics against a stored baseline snapshot when available; otherwise reports baseline values with trajectory_available=false and zero change metrics.

program_effectiveness_summary.effectiveness_confidence_definition: Weighted blend of forecast_confidence (35%), governance_confidence (35%), and observation/key volume factor min(1, observations/5)*min(1, keys/3) scaled by 0.4 when trajectory history is unavailable (30%).
program_effectiveness_summary.program_effectiveness_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: 100 * clamp01(0.20*closure_rate + 0.20*(forecast_accuracy*forecast_confidence) + 0.20*(stability_score/100) + 0.15*(1-regression_rate) + 0.15*(governance_health_score/100) + 0.10*(lifecycle_health_score/100)) * (1 - 0.30*watchlist_pressure), where watchlist_pressure is watchlist_size/max(total_keys,1). Higher scores indicate improving program outcomes.

remediation_effectiveness_summary.effectiveness_definition: Advisory remediation effectiveness: targeted_keys from remediation summary; improved_keys are targeted keys in dormant or retired lifecycle stages; unresolved_keys are targeted keys still active; recurrence_reduction_rate is resolved_or_retired_keys / max(historically_targeted_keys, 1). Without longitudinal remediation history, historically_targeted_keys defaults to current targeted_keys.

stability_trajectory_summary.trajectory_definition: Stability trajectory reports current stability_score and regression_recurrence_rate against baseline values; change metrics are zero when no prior baseline snapshot exists.

recurrence_program_effectiveness_summary.effectiveness_confidence_definition: Weighted blend of forecast_confidence (35%), governance_confidence (35%), and observation/key volume factor min(1, observations/5)*min(1, keys/3) scaled by 0.4 when trajectory history is unavailable (30%).
recurrence_program_effectiveness_summary.program_effectiveness_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: 100 * clamp01(0.20*closure_rate + 0.20*(forecast_accuracy*forecast_confidence) + 0.20*(stability_score/100) + 0.15*(1-regression_rate) + 0.15*(governance_health_score/100) + 0.10*(lifecycle_health_score/100)) * (1 - 0.30*watchlist_pressure), where watchlist_pressure is watchlist_size/max(total_keys,1). Higher scores indicate improving program outcomes.

recurrence_remediation_summary.estimated_portfolio_reduction_definition: Advisory estimate: highest key reduction_potential multiplied by remediation_confidence.

recurrence_remediation_targets.reduction_potential_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: 35% risk_share + 20% recurrence_intensity + 20% trend_weight + 15% forecast_weight + 10% concentration_contribution, where recurrence_intensity is occurrence_count/total_observations and concentration_contribution is risk_share multiplied by the max dimension concentration ratio.
recurrence_remediation_targets.remediation_priority_definition: Deterministic priority from reduction_potential: critical >= 75, high >= 50, medium >= 25, low < 25.

remediation_summary.estimated_portfolio_reduction_definition: Advisory estimate: highest key reduction_potential multiplied by remediation_confidence.

recurrence_roadmap.investment_priority_definition: Advisory 0-100 investment priority blends maturity ROI (45%), gap alignment (35%), and readiness impact (20%). Gap alignment weights initiative dimension deltas against current maturity gap analysis; readiness impact favors initiatives that unlock downstream dependencies when volume or trajectory prerequisites are unmet.
recurrence_roadmap.maturity_roi_definition: Advisory 0-100 maturity ROI: 100 * (expected_maturity_gain / implementation_complexity) / max_initiative_raw_roi, where expected_maturity_gain is the weighted sum of projected dimension deltas using recurrence maturity dimension weights and implementation_complexity is base complexity plus 5 per dependency. Higher values indicate better maturity return per unit implementation effort.

recurrence_roadmap_summary.roadmap_priority_guidance: Execute roadmap sequence in dependency order to reach optimized maturity.

recurrence_target_state.completion_criteria_definition: Optimized recurrence target state requires all maturity dimensions >= 80, operational_readiness >= 80, forecast_confidence >= 0.75, effectiveness_confidence >= 0.75, trajectory_available=true, measurable closure effectiveness, and measurable remediation effectiveness. Completion criteria are explicit boolean checks against these thresholds.

recurrence_roadmap.roadmap_priority_guidance: Execute roadmap sequence in dependency order to reach optimized maturity.
recurrence_roadmap.target_state_definition: Optimized recurrence target state requires all maturity dimensions >= 80, operational_readiness >= 80, forecast_confidence >= 0.75, effectiveness_confidence >= 0.75, trajectory_available=true, measurable closure effectiveness, and measurable remediation effectiveness. Completion criteria are explicit boolean checks against these thresholds.

recurrence_roadmap_summary.roadmap_priority_guidance: Execute roadmap sequence in dependency order to reach optimized maturity.

recurrence_roi.estimated_remediation_cost_definition: Advisory 0-100 estimate: 25% key_scope + 25% owner_dispersion + 20% field_path_dispersion + 15% scenario_scope + 15% recurrence_depth, where key_scope is min(1, recurrence_keys / max(total_keys, 1)), owner_dispersion is 1 - owner_concentration_ratio, field_path_dispersion is 1 - field_path_concentration_ratio, scenario_scope is min(1, scenario_count / 5), and recurrence_depth is min(1, observations / 10). Higher concentration lowers cost; broader scope raises it.
recurrence_roi.projected_improvement_definition: projected_recurrence_reduction is expected_benefit; projected_risk_reduction is expected_benefit multiplied by portfolio_risk_score / 100; projected_stability_improvement is expected_benefit multiplied by (100 - stability_score) / 100.
recurrence_roi.roi_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: min(100, 100 * expected_benefit / max(estimated_remediation_cost, 5)), where expected_benefit is reduction_potential multiplied by remediation_confidence. Higher scores indicate better expected return on remediation investment.

roi_summary.estimated_remediation_cost_definition: Advisory 0-100 estimate: 25% key_scope + 25% owner_dispersion + 20% field_path_dispersion + 15% scenario_scope + 15% recurrence_depth, where key_scope is min(1, recurrence_keys / max(total_keys, 1)), owner_dispersion is 1 - owner_concentration_ratio, field_path_dispersion is 1 - field_path_concentration_ratio, scenario_scope is min(1, scenario_count / 5), and recurrence_depth is min(1, observations / 10). Higher concentration lowers cost; broader scope raises it.
roi_summary.projected_improvement_definition: projected_recurrence_reduction is expected_benefit; projected_risk_reduction is expected_benefit multiplied by portfolio_risk_score / 100; projected_stability_improvement is expected_benefit multiplied by (100 - stability_score) / 100.
roi_summary.roi_confidence_definition: Weighted blend of forecast_confidence (35%), remediation_confidence (35%), and observation volume factor min(1, total_observations / 5) (30%).
roi_summary.roi_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: min(100, 100 * expected_benefit / max(estimated_remediation_cost, 5)), where expected_benefit is reduction_potential multiplied by remediation_confidence. Higher scores indicate better expected return on remediation investment.

recurrence_roi_summary.estimated_remediation_cost_definition: Advisory 0-100 estimate: 25% key_scope + 25% owner_dispersion + 20% field_path_dispersion + 15% scenario_scope + 15% recurrence_depth, where key_scope is min(1, recurrence_keys / max(total_keys, 1)), owner_dispersion is 1 - owner_concentration_ratio, field_path_dispersion is 1 - field_path_concentration_ratio, scenario_scope is min(1, scenario_count / 5), and recurrence_depth is min(1, observations / 10). Higher concentration lowers cost; broader scope raises it.
recurrence_roi_summary.projected_improvement_definition: projected_recurrence_reduction is expected_benefit; projected_risk_reduction is expected_benefit multiplied by portfolio_risk_score / 100; projected_stability_improvement is expected_benefit multiplied by (100 - stability_score) / 100.
recurrence_roi_summary.roi_confidence_definition: Weighted blend of forecast_confidence (35%), remediation_confidence (35%), and observation volume factor min(1, total_observations / 5) (30%).
recurrence_roi_summary.roi_score_definition: Advisory 0-100 score: min(100, 100 * expected_benefit / max(estimated_remediation_cost, 5)), where expected_benefit is reduction_potential multiplied by remediation_confidence. Higher scores indicate better expected return on remediation investment.

recurrence_target_state.completion_criteria_definition: Optimized recurrence target state requires all maturity dimensions >= 80, operational_readiness >= 80, forecast_confidence >= 0.75, effectiveness_confidence >= 0.75, trajectory_available=true, measurable closure effectiveness, and measurable remediation effectiveness. Completion criteria are explicit boolean checks against these thresholds.

recurrence_trajectory_history.definition: Append-only protected replay recurrence trajectory snapshots. Snapshot #1 is the longitudinal baseline; trajectory_available becomes true once two or more snapshots exist.

recurrence_trajectory_summary.definition: Trajectory summary compares the current snapshot against the baseline snapshot. With one snapshot only, trajectory_available=false and change metrics remain zero.
recurrence_trajectory_summary.message: Trajectory change detection active across baseline and current snapshots.

definitions.dormant: Multiple protected observations historically, but no observation within the last 30 days.
definitions.emerging: Exactly one protected observation exists for the recurrence key.
definitions.persistent: Multiple protected observations spanning at least 7 days between first and last seen.
definitions.recurring: Multiple protected observations with recent activity and without an extended active span.

recurrence_trends.growth_rate_definition: Share of protected recurrence keys currently classified as emerging (first observation only).

regression_recurrence_rate.definition: Share of observed recurrence keys with occurrence_count >= 2 in the measured history window.
regression_recurrence_rate.interpretation: Initial measurable proxy for recurrence keys that became active after prior observation; refine when richer state transitions exist. Advisory and report-only; does not gate protected replay.

regression_recurrence_rate.definition: Share of observed recurrence keys with occurrence_count >= 2 in the measured history window.
regression_recurrence_rate.interpretation: Initial measurable proxy for recurrence keys that became active after prior observation; refine when richer state transitions exist. Advisory and report-only; does not gate protected replay.

remediation_effectiveness_summary.effectiveness_definition: Advisory remediation effectiveness: targeted_keys from remediation summary; improved_keys are targeted keys in dormant or retired lifecycle stages; unresolved_keys are targeted keys still active; recurrence_reduction_rate is resolved_or_retired_keys / max(historically_targeted_keys, 1). Without longitudinal remediation history, historically_targeted_keys defaults to current targeted_keys.

stability_trajectory_summary.trajectory_definition: Stability trajectory reports current stability_score and regression_recurrence_rate against baseline values; change metrics are zero when no prior baseline snapshot exists.
